_note: STUB CONTENT for wiring/demo only. Marketing session authors real copy. AdviceEntry = {title, summary, guidance, focus, do[], avoid[], rating}. FREE daily = the two-number model in 'freeDaily' below (universalDay single-number block is SUPERSEDED, kept for reference only). PAID daily = personalDay keyed by number ('1'-'9','11','22','33'), with lifePathOverlay[lifePath][personalDay] an optional partial merged over it (overlay fields win, base is the fallback).

numbers._note: Per-number energy blocks. A = the day-of-month number's block, B = the universal-day number's block. Class templates weave these via {A.energy}/{A.move}/{A.trap}/{B.energy}/{B.move}/{B.trap}. Keys: 1-9, 11, 22, 33 (+ karmic 13/28, pending Manuel's final copy). STUB values - marketing replaces.

freeDaily._note: Two-number model: dayOfMonth (pure 1-9) x universalDay (1-9, 11, 22, 33). Engine scores the pair with numerologyCompat, then classifies: score>=thresholds.synergyMin -> 'synergy'; >=flowMin -> 'flow'; else LOW, which splits editorially via lowSplit[pairKey] into 'trap' (default) or 'bestOfBoth'. Wording = classTemplates[class], optionally overridden by heroPairs[pairKey]. pairKey = '<dayOfMonth>x<universalDay>' e.g. '1x9', '3x11'. A single compat score CANNOT tell trap from bestOfBoth (both can be low), so lowSplit is where you encode Manuel's rule per pair.

synergy.title: Cheat Code
synergy.summary: [stub] Both currents point the same way - a glitch in the matrix in your favor.
synergy.guidance: [stub] The date carries {dayOfMonth} energy ({A.energy}) and today's universal number is {universalDay} ({B.energy}) - they stack. {A.move} and the day backs you. Rare free lunch; use it.

flow.title: Flow Day
flow.guidance: [stub] The date's {A.energy} ({dayOfMonth}) and the day's {B.energy} ({universalDay}) sit fine together - steady, no fight. {A.move} without overthinking.

trap.title: Matrix Trap
trap.summary: [stub] The two numbers fight over the SAME move - the obvious play quietly misfires.
trap.guidance: [stub] The date is a {dayOfMonth} ({A.energy}) but the day itself runs {universalDay} ({B.energy}) - pulling opposite on the same action. The urge to {A.move} feels right and fizzles. Don't force it today.
do: Wait a beat on the obvious move

bestOfBoth.title: Hardest to Farm
bestOfBoth.summary: [stub] Two different lanes you can run at once.
bestOfBoth.guidance: [stub] The date's a {dayOfMonth} ({A.energy}) and the day's a {universalDay} ({B.energy}) - different lanes, both real. Don't blend them into mush; {A.move} AND {B.move}, on purpose. The rare day you get both.

1x9.title: The Quiet Misfire
1x9.guidance: [stub hero] Day 1 begs you to start; Universal 9 is a closing energy. Starting today feels right and quietly fizzles - finish something instead.

1.summary: A day the collective clock resets to one.
1.guidance: [stub] Universal 1 favors initiating over finishing. Plant, don't harvest.

2.guidance: [stub] Universal 2 rewards patience and partnership over force.
